title: I get a command to resolve error "Failed to remove image, image is in use by container"
body:
I cannot write on issue 7889, so i am writing here.

On Windows 11, you can use the command below to delete intermediate containers.

``podman rm (podman ps -aq --storage)``

I ran this command on Powershell 7.5

comments.body:
And after the command above i can run:

``podman rmi (podman images -aq)``

With this i get rid of all images used by intermediate containers.

Thanks for creating this and suggesting a command to fix. I am closing this issue.
 
Proposed fix for https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7889
